svg.text: Juplaya trailer - power system physical layout
Plan view, looking down. Nose/front at left, rear/ramp at right. Curbside = passenger / awning / door side. Scale 1 in = 4 px (plan panels).
Roof PV - 3x LG455 in 3S (1365 W) -> SmartSolar 250/60-Tr
125" AC-aft -> rear rail = solar field (3 panels need ~123-124")
Fiamma F45s awning case 138" + warm 24 V LED strip (curbside, at roofline)
C Nose power cabinet - contents & 48 V spine
Contents + required connections (flows bottom-up: battery -> bus -> converters -> loads).
Exact internal stationing is an open gate - this is not a final placement.
Blue Sea 5026 24 V branches: fridge - interior/exterior LED zones - USB-C PD - GPS - winter heater outlet.
Cabin face: Blue Sea 8260 + 6x 8282 switches + 6x 24 V dimmers (INTERIOR/CURB/ROAD/NOSE/REAR/AWNING).
Vent: low filtered cabin intake + high fan-assisted exhaust (24 V fan + thermostat); no exterior penetration.
Anker SOLIX C1000 + PS400 - standalone 120 VAC camp island.
Optional ground-mounted 2S LG PV (910 W) + SmartSolar 150/35.
Sources: docs/power.md, docs/dimensions.md. This is the physical
layout; the electrical schematic is docs/diagrams/power-overview.*.
